PowerShell(foreach \($scope in 'Process','User','Machine'\) { $v = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('GeminiAI__ApiKey', $scope\); if \($v\) { Write-Output "$scope GeminiAI__ApiKey: ...$\($v.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0,$v.Length-6\)\)\) \(len $\($v.Length\)\)" } else { Write-Output "$scope GeminiAI__ApiKey: <none>" } }; Get-ChildItem Env: | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'Gemini' } | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "Env $\($_.Name\) = ...$\($_.Value.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0,$_.Value.Length-6\)\)\)" })
